---
title: "Setting Up A New Hub"
sidebarTitle: "New Hub Setup"
description: "The processes that must be completed by the Development and Operations teams when launching a new FKL hub."
---

## Overview

When a new hub needs to be launched, there are various processes that must be completed across the platforms used by FKL. Some of these are for the **Development Team** and some are for the **Operations Team**.

<Note>
  Processes linking to a SOP marked **(draft)** have a page in place, but the content is still to be written.
</Note>

---

## Prerequisite

Before any Development Team or Deployment Team processes can begin, a new seller must be requested from Vivenu. This is not a Development Team responsibility, but it is a prerequisite for both teams.

| Process | SOP | Duration |
|--|--|--|
| Request new seller with Vivenu | [Request New Seller SOP (draft)](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/request-new-seller) | 2 weeks |

---

## Development Team

<Note>
  All Development Team SOPs below apply to the **production** environment only. The DEV environment is configured separately in the isolated DEV sellers.
</Note>

| # | Process | SOP | Duration |
|--|--|--|--|
| 1 | Configure seller domain (DNS) | [Seller Domain SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-seller-domain) | TBC |
| 2 | Configure email domain (DNS) | [Email Domain SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-email-domain) | TBC |
| 3 | Arrange Vivenu configuration of redirection from shop URL to our website | [Shop URL Redirect SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/arrange-shop-redirect) | TBC |
| 4 | Configure Microsoft Teams notification team | [Teams Notification SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-teams-notification) | TBC |
| 5 | Configure API key | [API Key SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-api-key) | TBC |
| 6 | Configure new hub region in GKL API | [New Hub Region SOP (draft)](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-new-hub-region) | TBC |
| 7 | Configure webhooks | [Webhooks SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-webhooks) | TBC |
| 8 | Configure TalentID/API integration | [TalentID Integration SOP (draft)](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-talentid-integration) | TBC |
| 9 | Configure Telemetry regions | [Telemetry Regions SOP (draft)](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/configure-telemetry-regions) | TBC |
| 10 | Test seller setup (redirect not a prerequisite) | [Test Setup SOP (draft)](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/development/test-setup) | TBC |

---

## Deployment Team

| Process | SOP |
|--|--|
| Configure the payment gateway | [Gateway SOP](/software/third-party/vivenu/hub-deployment/vivenu-setting-up-a-payment-gateway) | 30 mins |
| Configure the payment strategies | Coming soon | TBC |
| Populate the legal information | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure the email template | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure the events configurations | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure a new landing page for redirecting the customer | Coming soon | TBC |
| Configure Google Analytics / Tag Manager | Coming soon | TBC |
